feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Import Sales Dimensions
entry.content:
Hi, I tried to import the "Sales dimensions" like the length, width, height and volume through "Import From Excel" and "DTW" but it's not updating even after not getting an error while uploading. 

Are there a working templates with an example regarding the same. 

Note: There are many UoM for the same item and I am trying to upload for all of them, but even when I tried for one UoM I got the same result as explained above.

entry.title: Crystal Reports - SAP Business One - GS1 Datamatrix Code
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

i like to create a Datamatrix Code with GS1 Standard. As far as I know Crystal report does not support Datamatrix Codes, but it can be achived with additional tools.

Who has live customers creating Datamatrix Codes (maybe even with GS1 Standard) and which tools are the using ?

 

Kind regards
Tobias

entry.title: Payment Wizard didn't generate any documents
entry.content:
Hello Community,

My client is having a problem with the Payment Wizard where he executed the payment wizard and it didn´t generate any document, didn't also generate any error from step 7 to step 8.

After selecting the option "Execute Payment Run" the Summary says that were created a total of 0 documents.

My client selected the respective BP and also selected the documents which he wants the outgoing payments to be created.

*Images Attached

Can someone help please?

entry.title: SAP B1: Can I add a column to Inventory Status (Available-to-Promise) with UDF or UI API?
entry.content: Can I add a column to Inventory Status (Available-to-Promise) with UDF or UI API?

entry.title: Base ratio is calculated on the Production Order row level.
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Please guide us on how Base ratio is calculated on the Production Order row level.

The screenshot is attached below for your reference.

Regards,

Amir Sayyed.

entry.title: Red lines in Inventory Value Report SAP Business One
Unit price with GST and remove GST from that price SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Good day!

We would like to set up specific functionality for one particular item group in SAP Business One. Please refer to the scenario below for a better understanding:

Scenario:

  • We have an item with a unit price of 600 INR.
  • A 50% discount is applied, bringing the new unit price to 300 INR after the discount.
  • When 18% IGST is selected as a tax code, the calculation should work as follows:
    1. The price before discount (before applying GST) is calculated as:
      • 300 INR - 18% (GST) = 254 INR.
    2. The user will apply 18% IGST on the 254 INR.
    3. The total document value should be:
      • 254 INR × 18% (GST) = 299.72 INR.

We require this setup to only apply to one specific item group and ensure the system follows the above logic when creating sales orders for items within this group.

Could you please guide us on how to configure this setup in SAP Business One? If customization or further actions are needed, kindly provide the necessary steps or suggestions.

How can i handle?

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: FMS line level required into SAP b1
entry.content:
Dear all,

I have 4 UDF. 

First row level UDF Unit price

Second row level UDF Discount(%)

Third row level UDF Price after discount. It is calculated first level UDF * Second level UDF

Fourth row level UDF values calculate like Third UDF Value * GST rate

Advice on 4 different FMS to assign each one column row level UDF while row wise calculated. 

 

SAP B1 SQL

 

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: Documents not integrated between TPV and SAP
entry.content:
hello in the company we are relatively new using SAPB1 and especially TPV, we had an incident with one of the teams and due to ignorance, we took a step that harmed us with the integration of TPV documents to SAP and we don't see how we can correct the incident.

 

Documents are not integrated because they indicate that related documents already exist.

 

I show you in the picture:

 

Has this happened to anyone in the forum? You may be able to guide me with a solution to this type of incident? 

 

Thank you in advance for the help

 

Best regards

Harvey Oropeza.

entry.title: SAP B1 Error -126 Failed to get license server address from SLD - SAP B1 Authentication Server
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have an application (service) that uses DI-API.

With the new version 2502 it is not possible anymore to connect to the DI-API when an Identity Provider was activated:

I have followed the explanation of this document:

https://help.sap.com/doc/64cff8d4a2f041fb8cc6c2d5fe42a86c/10.0_SP_2502/en-US/2d099edcd3644a85ae328eab6e9167f6.pdf

I have created an extension of type 'Daemon Service' in the Extension Single Sign On Manager.

I can sucessfully get an access token, and the company ID.

However when I use it to connect to the company I get this error message:

 

My code:

SAPbobsCOM.Company m_company = new SAPbobsCOM.Company();
m_company.AccessToken = accessToken;
m_company.CompanyID = companyID;
m_company.Server = server;
           
if (m_company.Connect() != 0)
{
    //Error
    MessageBox.Show("Error occured with code: " + m_company.GetLastErrorCode() + " " + m_company.GetLastErrorDescription());
}
else
{
    // Get the current company information
    SAPbobsCOM.CompanyInfo companyInfo = m_company.GetCompanyService().GetCompanyInfo();
    string message = string.Format("Company Name: {0}\nCompany Version: {1}",
		            companyInfo.CompanyName, companyInfo.Version);
	            MessageBox.Show(message, "Connected!");

    return m_company;
}

Any help would be appreciated!

entry.title: (Bill of Exchange) Incoming payments Error in the Brazilian Version of SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

I hope this message finds you well.

We have encountered some challenges and Please check item 2 in the attachment below

  • Error : invalid dll path or name [message 81104-5]

Thank you for your time and assistance. We look forward to your prompt response.

Best regards,

entry.title: FMS Correction into SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear team,

SELECT $[RDR1.U_PriceAfter] - (SELECT SUM(T0.VatSum) FROM RDR1 T0 WHERE T0.DocEntry = $[RDR1.DocEntry])

 

I need to minus VATSUM from the row level UDF named : U_PriceAfter

Please advice on it.

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: SAP B1: Open a form as View Mode
entry.content: Can I open a form as View Mode instead of default Add Mode?

entry.title: Create button with event request http
entry.content:
Hi,

I have the SAP Business One version, and I need to create a button to invoke an HTTP request (to generate a multibanco reference) and update the record.

I also have the b1 usability package installed, and creating a universal function, using the HTTP Trigger, I am not able to do it.

Is it possible to do this functionality?

Thank you.

entry.title: Problem export pdf api Service Layer API
entry.content:
I needed to export the PDF of the invoice or sales order via the Service Layer API.

Is it possible or is there a method to extract it?

Thank you

entry.title: how can i set a specific transaction code
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community

I hope this message finds you well

I am reaching out to inquire about setting default transaction codes for specific screens in SAP Business One.

Could you please provide guidance on how this can be accomplished?

below Attachement. Program names is "Final Clsoing"

Thank you for your assitance

Best regrads

entry.title: Issue with FMS on Issue for Production Quantity
entry.content:
Hello,

I have created below fms on Issue for Production document which is not getting triggered on its own:

SELECT CASE
WHEN CAST($[$13.1880000004.0] AS INT) = 4
THEN CAST($[$13.87.0] AS DECIMAL(18,4))
ELSE 0.0001
END

Scenario: If the selected row item is a resources or rowtype = 290, then it should populate .0001 in quantity field.

I want this to be triggered when a production order is selected on the issue for production document.

Can anyone please suggest what corrections to make in this fms or suggest a better query to get this fms working?

Regards,

Joseph

entry.title: Alert Management module
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I would like to use the Alert Management module in my SAP Business One 10.0 to create an Alerts Query. I already enabled the Alert Service checkbox and "Send Alert for Activities Scheduled for Today" in the General Settings but despite of this, Condition and Document Tab in Alert Management - Alert Details were still missing.

When I checked the predefined alerts, it has Condition and Documents Tabs though. Any ideas?



Sincerely,

Edzel.

entry.title: Is there a way to add the source of the journal entry?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community

I hope this message finds you well.

Is there a way to add the source of the journal entry?

In the foreign currency revaluation gain or loss,

the journal entry is created as JE.

I would like to differentiate it with another value.

If there's anything more you need,

just let me know!

Below Attachment.

Thank you!!!

Best Regards

entry.title: I'm facing the same issue please help anybody
entry.content: GST regular item or GST nil rated item cannot be used on Bill of Supply
